missions.title: Basundhara Park Clean-up
missions.description: Comprehensive ecological audit and waste management drive in Pokhara.
missions.detail: Our flagship mission at Basundhara Park, Pokhara. The RU Club Motherland team conducted a thorough ecological audit, waste segregation drive, and community awareness program. With support from Doko Recyclers and Pokhara Metropolitan City, we surveyed 20+ areas and engaged 25+ volunteers in restoring the park's natural beauty.

missions.title: Recycling & Upcycling Training Program
missions.description: Three-school training on Recycling and Upcycling with Doko Recyclers, supported by the Government of Nepal and KOICA.
missions.detail:
In Pokhara-7 Masbar, Motherland Secondary School conducted an event attended by two other schools for gaining knowledge on Recycling and Upcycling, with the support of the Government of Nepal, KOICA and Doko Recyclers.

The training went from 10:45 AM to 3:50 PM, spanning 5 hours and 5 minutes. Trainers from Doko Recyclers gave the basics to students from Motherland Secondary School, Shree Tal Barahi Secondary School, and Shree Barahi Secondary School. The students distinguished between waste materials and learned solutions to these problems.

The training included a practical work divided into two halves following the 7R's rule: separating waste materials by type and recyclability, and using different wastes to create art (upcycling). The students produced astonishing results beyond what mentors expected. With minimal training from Chillionaire Productions, they showcased pieces belonging in an art museum.
